# Lucia Puccini — Resume (source: Lucia_Puccini_Resume_EN.pdf)

## Contact

- **Name:** Lucia Puccini
- **Title:** Software Engineer | Frontend
- **Location:** Barcelona, Spain
- **Phone:** +34 675 512 388
- **Email:** puccinilucia@gmail.com
- **Website:** https://luciapuccini.com/
- **LinkedIn:** https://www.linkedin.com/in/luciapuccini/
- **GitHub:** https://github.com/luciapuccini

## Professional Summary

 Software Engineer with 7+ years of experience building high-performance web applications. Deep expertise in React, Next.js, TypeScript, and frontend architecture in production front-end applications. Proven track record in web performance optimization, technical SEO, cross-functional collaboration, and delivering data-driven features. Passionate about leveraging AI to automate workflows and enhance user experience.

## ATS Keywords — Technical Stack

Comma-separated keywords for applicant tracking systems and role matching:

**Frontend:** JavaScript (ES6+), TypeScript, HTML5, CSS3, React, Next.js, Server-Side Rendering (SSR), Static Site Generation (SSG), Streaming UI, Redux, Zustand, Zod, Tailwind CSS, SASS, Flexbox, Responsive Design, shadcn/ui, Vite, Jest, Vitest, React Testing Library, Percy, Storybook, Cypress

**AI & LLM:** OpenAI API, Anthropic, Hugging Face, LangChain, LangGraph, Generative AI, Large Language Models (LLM), LLM Integration, Prompt Engineering, AI Agents, AI-Powered Automation, Retrieval-Augmented Generation (RAG), Pinecone

**Backend & Infrastructure:** Node.js, Python, REST APIs, GraphQL, tRPC, Kafka, SQS, Redis, PostgreSQL, S3, Docker, Monorepo (npm workspaces), Microfrontends, Git, GitHub, GitHub Actions, CI/CD, AWS, EC2, Vercel, Cloudflare

**Performance & Quality:** Web Performance Optimization, Core Web Vitals (CWV), Lighthouse, React Profiler, DevTools, Code Splitting, Bundle Optimization, Accessibility (WCAG), Technical SEO, A/B Testing, LaunchDarkly

**Tools & Practices:** Agile, Jira, Code Reviews, Technical Specifications, Cross-Functional Collaboration, Slack, Datadog, Cursor, Claude Code

## Technical Skills

### Frontend

JavaScript (ES6+), TypeScript, HTML5, CSS3, React, Next.js, Server-Side Rendering (SSR), Static Site Generation (SSG), Streaming UI, Client state management libraries (Redux, Zustand), Zod, Tailwind CSS, SASS, Flexbox, Responsive Design, shadcn/ui, Vite, Jest, Vitest, React Testing Library, Percy

### AI & LLM Integration

OpenAI API, Anthropic, Hugging Face, LangChain, Generative AI, Large Language Models (LLM), LLM Integration, Prompt Engineering, AI Agents, AI-Powered Automation, Retrieval-Augmented Generation (RAG), Pinecone

### Backend & Infrastructure

Node.js, Python, REST APIs, GraphQL, tRPC, Kafka, SQS, Redis, PostgreSQL, S3, Docker, Monorepo (npm workspaces), Microfrontends, Git, GitHub, GitHub Actions, CI/CD, AWS, Vercel, Cloudflare

### Performance & Quality

Web Performance Optimization, Core Web Vitals (CWV), Lighthouse, React Profiler, DevTools, Code Splitting, Bundle Optimization, Accessibility (WCAG), Technical SEO, A/B Testing

### Tools

Agile, Jira, Code Reviews, Technical Specifications, Cross-Functional Collaboration, Slack, Datadog, Cursor, Claude Code

## Work Experience

### Software Engineer | Consultant — Present

**Small Businesses**

- Consulted on frontend architecture, performance, and full-stack delivery. Close partnership with clients to best fit the solution to their needs.
- Delivered end-to-end features integrating third-party APIs, CMS platforms, and automated notification systems.

###  Software Engineer — Gartner (Oct 2021 – Dec 2025)

**GetApp.com**

Owned frontend architecture for a B2B software discovery platform serving high-traffic organic search, using React, Next.js, and GraphQL.

- Partnered with design to implement and maintain a custom SASS design system, documented and tested in Storybook
- Drove technical SEO and web performance fixing structural issues that were penalizing organic traffic
- Proactively worked with product on rapid experimentation (LaunchDarkly A/B testing), proposing high-impact, low-effort technical improvements aligned with business goals
- Experimented with LLM integration and generative AI review summaries as part of the organic growth strategy
- Applied testing practices with Jest and Cypress (end-to-end)

**Other relevant projects:**

- Delivered an AI chatbot proof-of-concept from product ideation to full demo rollout. Built a Retrieval-Augmented Generation (RAG) using OpenAI API, Pinecone vector database, and LangChain/LangGraph for orchestration, Vite frontend interface styled in Tailwind CSS and backend in Python. Deployed Docker containers in AWS EC2
- Partnered with marketing to build a system consolidating customer profiles from multiple websites, enabling targeted campaigns for high-value users. Worked across the full stack with event-driven architecture: Kafka, SQS, PostgreSQL, Docker, and CI/CD pipelines (GitHub Actions)

### Front End Developer — Nimble.la (Sep 2018 – Aug 2021)

**Startups**

- Collaborated in cost-efficient MVPs to validate startup ideas in early stages, architecting React & TypeScript front ends and integrating REST APIs within agile, product-oriented teams
- Delivered multiple products across different domains in a fast-paced environment, iterating quickly while applying good practices, testing, and scalability principles to keep codebases maintainable
- Gained experience with multiple client solutions: mobile hybrid apps, desktop applications, web applications

## Education

Degree in Engineering Information Systems at National Technological University ("Universidad Tecnológica Nacional" - UTN), Rosario, Argentina

- React Performance, v2 — FrontEnd Masters (Jun 2026)
